title: many_to_many Posts and Tags with join table
prompt: Build a many_to_many association: MyApp.Blog.Post has many tags, and MyApp.Blog.Tag has many posts, joined by a `posts_tags` table. Use `many_to_many :tags, MyApp.Blog.Tag, join_through: "posts_tags"`. Also write the migration for the posts_tags join table (no primary key, references to both parents with cascade delete, and a unique index on the pair). Schema files to lib/my_app/blog/post.ex and lib/my_app/blog/tag.ex; migration to priv/repo/migrations/20260411800000_create_posts_tags.exs.
tier_rationale: Three-file coordination with a named join table. Sonnet often forgets the primary_key: false, or the unique_index, or the cascading references.
